title: Token of Friendship
description: Introduces expanded friendship with iron golems, wolves, endermen and villagers, offering alternatives to killing them for loot.
body: This mod turns certain mobs into momentary friends through gifts. Offer an item they love, share a brief dance together, and receive a reward. Endermen will teleport away leaving behind pearls, wolves will share bones, iron golems iron, and villagers beds. It creates memorable interactions while remaining vanilla in nature.
